activity_zone_items.name: White balloons
activity_zone_items.specifics: White colored; scattered on floor at start, used for throwing, catching, and play throughout session

activity_zone_items.name: Yellow balloons
activity_zone_items.specifics: Yellow colored; scattered on floor at start, one specifically thrown by adult during activity

notes: Total balloon count at session start is nine (six white, three yellow). Observations at 00:00:50 note children each holding one balloon, suggesting one per child (six children), but total balloon count does not change explicitly. A second adult is briefly visible in the background at 00:01:00 but does not appear to interact with the activity zone. The man in the maroon shirt seen at 00:00:00 exits before the activity begins and is not part of the activity.
